title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself, your opinions and your experiences. Answer naturally and try to develop your responses.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: Can you tell me about a hobby you recently started?
Which sports do you enjoy, and why?
What's your favorite book, and what makes it special to you?
How do you usually spend your weekends?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How do your daily habits help you stay productive?
In what ways do you think technology has changed the way we communicate in recent years?
What challenges do you face balancing work and relaxation?
How do you incorporate exercise into your routine, and why is it important to you?
What do you consider the most important aspect of maintaining a healthy lifestyle?

phases.name: Abstract / Personal Growth
questions: How do you define success, and how has your definition evolved over time?
What values do you consider most important in your personal and professional life?
How do you approach personal development and self-improvement?
